general.description: General-purpose agent use a inherited model. Use this agent to execute multiple units of work in parallel.

general-small.description: General-purpose agent use a fast, cheap model. Use this agent for mechanical implementation tasks (isolated functions, clear specs, 1-2 files).

general-standard.description: General-purpose agent use a standard model. Use this agent for integration and judgment tasks (multi-file coordination, pattern matching, debugging)

general-max.description: General-purpose agent use the most capable available model. Use this agent for architecture, design, and review tasks
